hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'claude/friendly-gauss-AGnJ3'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Only push to the production branch: claude/friendly-gauss-AGnJ3. Use: git push origin claude/friendly-gauss-AGnJ3"}'; fi
